title: Great headphones
text:
My husband loves these -
Music sounds great - 🙏🏽

Problems with Charge - not charging properly as of October 13,2021
Previously worked very good - not now

title: Headset
text:
Thank you for having it in a box when arrived.. It's A good headset. Everything works smoothly. Music sounds great. You can talk on the phone sounds great.
I love this set.

title: Awesome Bang for Buck
text:
5 stars because of the price. I am quite amazed at these headphones for the price. Like wine, I rate headphones based on their price point and these are, for sure, the best I have tried in this price range.

Pros
- noise canceling. These are not active noise canceling headphones, but they do a great job in isolating outside noise.
- sound quality. I am shocked at how good these sound with music. I also listen to some talk radio and while not as good, they are still pretty great.
- comfortable ear pads
- quickly and easily connected to multiple devices
- long battery life

Cons
- I have a huge head. I buy fitted hats in size "biggest you sell". These are a bit tight on my head but I am going to try and stretch them out as I have heard others have had success. If not, my girlfriend gets these.

Summary
At this price point (I paid $25, usually run a little higher), I can't imagine a better on-ear headphone.

title: For small heads and has annoying 'tapping' sound when nothing is playing.
text:
I have a large head. Fully extended these barely reach my ears. And they are tight. If they were bigger I would like them more. So if you have a small or regular size head these are fine and good for the money. But if you have a large head because of your large brain, expect these to be tight and almost uncomfortable to wear for too long.

UPDATED: So I'm sitting here in the wee hours of the morning listening to YT through these. I love early morning because it's so quiet. I bought these so I could be up early and be able to listen to YT or other things on the internet and not disturb others sleeping. Now I notice some 'tapping' in my right headphone. It sounds like rain dripping from a rain gutter. It's very annoying. I can only hear it if nothing is playing. I flipped the headphones around and it's definitely only coming out of the right headphone. It would be nice if these things were absolutely silent when nothing is playing. It would be even nicer if we cou

title: My go to headphones
text: I’m really good at breaking headphones. Because of that I don’t like to spend too much on headphones because I know they won’t last. I’ve probably tried every cheap headphone brand you can think of. I’m talking very cheap and low quality headphones. These are relatively cheap but they are VERY durable and great quality. The sound is loud, has decent bass, and the battery lasts for weeks. Even if I listen multiple days in a row I almost never have to charge the battery. These are just really good headphones.

title: Worth Sales Price
text:
I got these JBL wireless bluetooth headphones 50% off for black friday. They are well worth the $25 I paid and I am very satisfied with their sound quality and frequency range. I don't think I would pay the $50 retail price... not becuse they are bad, but because there are others with exceptional sound quality and audio / noise canceling features starting at the $50 price point.

If you can find these for under $35, I highly recommend them! If not, I suggest browsing / comparing other options. Regardless, they are great sounding headphones for the price I paid!

title: Disappointed on ear pads
text:
Everything about this headset was great for the discount that it was in, but it is not worth it for the full price. My one-year-old daughter got a hold of them and ripped off the ear pads in an instant. I was able to manage to place this back in carefully but knowing how this was set up make it feel less quality, especially coming from JBL. They had years of comfort and reliability on their products, so why cheap out on bad ear pads that can be easily taken off? Unless this was a design choice to change them out for "alternative colors" this is annoying to place back in. One night I was using this on my Steam Deck and the other pad came loose as I tugged on them. The only consideration is that I can place these back in, but this is a hassle and hopefully, it does happen often as it did for me.

I love the sound quality, I heard from others that I sound great over the phone with these ,and are great to travel with. This does not cover my ears completely so I would consider the

title: Very pleasant sound
text: I use these almost every night to watch tv.  They produce very good sound - voices are very clear and all sounds seem to be very accurate.  They are also very pleasant to use for listening to music — to my ears they are flat, they reproduce all of the bass, midrange and treble that is on the original source accurately.  Obviously I am not listening to lossless audio and these are not $500 headphones, but for listening to cd quality audio by Bluetooth these are excellent headphones.  Also my ears get too hot with almost all headphones, but these are really comfortable - I can wear them for about an hour before having to let my ears breathe for a minute and then I can put them back on for another hour.  And battery life is excellent - I charge them about once a week and they have never given out using them for about 2 hours/day.

title: OUCH!!!  these things squeeze your head!
text:
I have now had these headphones off for long enough to submit a return and get the label printed out but as I am typing this, my ears still hurt.

I have a normal sized head, wear a medium sized baseball hat and yet when I put these on they just squeezed my head and felt uncomfortable. I thought... nah, they are new, I'll give them a bit... NOPE!

a few minutes into wearing them and I could not stand it anymore. I took them off and had my wife and kids try. they hated the headphones.

did I mention my ears are still feeling that squeeze? never had this before with other headphones. very sad as I was hoping these would be amazing since JBL usually makes good stuff. not this time.

title: Strong sound, controls and connection OK
text:
Of course not as fine a sound as studio-grade headphones, but still consistently better than any earbud ever made. Relatively comfortable-- you can wear them longer than the higher-quality shell-type headset. Bass response is good, not great. At least the bass is not over-accentuated, like on some models. Treble range is not brittle, it's balanced. You might hope it would pair up with your sound source a little easier, and I've experienced some glitching when pairing these JBL phones with an .mp3 player that I'm wearing, but that might be a deficiency with the player, b/c when paired with a TaoTronics TTBA07 bluetooth transmitter, it works without error.

Fairly good noise cancelling. I expect there will be some durability issues with the ear pads wearing out. It's typical of headphones, so I try to treat them gently.

title: Affordable and it works
text:
Love these headphones for one reason, it was cheap lol. I have purchased 4 noise-cancelling headphones in one year for my son. Bought a Sony brand, Bose brand, and 2 Beats brand and they all broke. I’m so glad that he has bluetooth capabilities on his computer and phone, bc I think that was the problem for two of the brands.
I’ve asked how well the headphones are and he responds with it works. So I’m happy I’m not spending so much money on needing headphones to just work. If needed, I can buy another one. But he did say the noise cancellation works bc he doesn’t hear the neighbor’s dogs barking at night and the sound is impeccable. He also likes that the headphones are comfy. One thing he doesn’t like, it doesn’t have a cord lol.

title: They are nice. Easy to find because of color.
text:
I did not buy these headphones for their noise cancelling qualities. I got them because my in-ear phones don't always connect via bluetooth without a lot of fooling around.

The sound quality is very good. The fit is too tight, and after an hour become uncomfortable. Noise cancellation is average; I can hear the telephone, the tv, any equipment (vacuum cleaner) I'm operating, for example. But the outside noise does not interfere with understanding what comes over the headphones. Once the volume is set for the task at hand, I don't change it, so volume control is moot. These headphones seem heavier than the advertised weight.

I prefer my in-ear phones that do not have a noise cancelling feature, for fit and weight.

title: Not bad, but could be better.
text: I like the price and the famous name. The sound, I thought was great. The ear muffs begin to irritate after a few hours. I don't even need to charge them very often. My wife got "Over-the-ear" headphones and they were even cheaper had more features and sounded so much better, the bass on hers blew these away. I could wear over-the-ear type for much longer but these were the first I ever owned. Tried earbuds several different kinds and I sweat pretty bad when I train and they all would just fall out. I'm going to upgrade to over the ear and with more control of the sound, perhaps a type that has an app to help set the sound.

title: WOW! I wasn't expecting this...
text:
My profession is i am a sound engineer. I own a pair of Harmon Kardon that I absolutely love! Well, I got to the point that I did not want to use or take my Harmon on the road or to my gigs. So I found these JBL 510BT for a great price. So I took a chance on this unit and man, I am glad I did! These headphone has a great sound! I was not expecting the bass response I got from it from my MP3 player on my phone! In fact, the hi's & kid's are very clear and clean sounding!

The 510BT are so comfortable! The first evening i got them, I wore them for 3 hours and it felt like I could have worn them for another 4 hours!!! I paired them with my bluetooth transmitter coming from my TV, and the sound is sooooo clear!

If you are looking for a pair of good headphones at a great price, look no further!

title: Great economy headphones
text:
I've had these headphones a few weeks now and have used them several times. Connectivity to my three-year-old Samsung Galaxy S10e cell phone was easy, although still haven't been able to connect them to my 2018 Amazon Fire7 or 2014 Dell desktop computer. :(

Sound and range: While not noise cancelling, volume moderation makes listening reasonably focused with minimal external noise detection. Sound quality is very good for the price and range is impressive. I have clear, uninterrupted connectivity/sound throughout my home, inside and out. I walked half a block outside before sound started cutting out.

Battery: Battery life is exceptional. I used the device for several hours then turned it off to store them. Several days later they still had 100% charge and functioned for another few hours. I just rebooted the headphones after a week in a drawer and the battery reading is still 100%!

Comfort: The headphones are adjustable. That said, one reviewer men

title: Made for small/narrow faces; otherwise fine
text:
I bought these on sale without, and I can't quite bring myself to return them because they are otherwise serviceable, but they feel quite tight on my head and there's no proper way to adjust them out, just longer or shorter. Because these are on ear headphones, that lack of adjustability means that my ears are smashed pretty tightly against my head and quickly become uncomfortable and warm. For reference, my head is between 21" and 22" around at the top of my ears... which appears to be average per Google.

TLDR: If you are an adult with an average size head, these may not be as comfortable a fit as you'd expect.

title: Good sound, ear cups a little small
text: These are great for noise cancellation and provide excellent sound. But the ear cups are a little small for me (normal adult male ears). So the padding doesn’t fully encapsulate my ears - just barely. But nothing that is a deal breaker. The control buttons don’t sync well with my iPhone, so I can’t easily change songs, answer calls, or use Siri. But overall good value for price.

title: Really awesome Headphoned!
text: I love these! I have had my eye on them since last Christmas and they were more expensive.  When I checked them last week I seen a price drop and I HAD to get them!  I love the sound (base is awesome, and the sound is as loud as you want!  I highly recommend!

title: Power button failure
text: I love the sound with these headphones, but I haven't even been using for a month and now the power button does not want to work. I cannot get it to turn on or off.  My husband has a certain way of pressing on the top of the button with his nail and he somehow gets it to turn on. I've tried with no luck. I am not ruining my nails every day just to turn these headphones on and off. I am sending them back.  :-(

title: Not the quality I suspected from JBL..
text: Product instructions were terrible.  They need to be written so a non techy person can handle the pairing process.  Theses are not had to ask for help and a knowledgeable person struggled to get them paired and running..

title: Nice headset
text: This is replacing my Bose that my dogs got a hold of.  You can buy this sane headset st Walley world for the price of 49.99 so you really do not have to wait if you buy one.  They sound good work week as a head set.  Not a bose but does the job and sounds great for the money

title: they can be tight on the ears
text: These on-ear sound great.  Bass is rich and deep, the mids and highs come through clear.  They have, imo, excellent battery life.  If I can warn folks about anything: Consider that they are on-ear headphones, if you wear glasses it can be a bit uncomfortable under prolong use.  I found myself adjusting the headphones to ease the pressure on my upper ear lobes after prolonged use.  That said, I believe this phenomenon is true of any on-ear headset.  And it is likely equally a challenge if you were to use cans (over-ear headphones).  Just something us glasses wearer need to keep in mind.

title: Great
text: Bought on special, my gosh they are great!

title: Easy to use.
text:
I have in the last few years had many wireless headphones. All of them in the $100+ price range, so i did not have high hope for these, got them as a backup for my earbuds. What a nice surprise! These are the best of all of them, both in terms of ease of use and comfort. It takes a little fooling around with the articulated ear pieces to get to the recharging port. But after a time of 2 it is a simple operation. with a rated 12 hours per charge, it is very easy to have them charged all the time. The connection is easy the first time and automatic thereafter. I use Linux and have had no issues with the Bluetooth connection. For the price I would say give them a try. I did, and have had around a month of trouble free use so far, roughly 16 hours per day.

Hope this helps

title: what a deal
text: I know i love my JBL Bluetooth speaker and there ear phones do not disappoint either, great sound.

title: Won't connect!
text: These work great for about a week or so and then lose the ability to connect to anything other than the first device you connected to. Resetting does nothing to help this problem. None of the troubleshooting tips fix the issue either. This is the second pair I've purchased, thinking the first one was just a dud, but clearly they all are faulty and not worth the money or the headache. Super disappointed.

title: They cut out if you are more than a short distance from the source.
text: AS my title suggests, these headphone will disconnect from your bluetooth source if you move more than a short distance away.  These are the least satisfactory of the various headphones I have used over the years.

title: Good clear sound
text: Good base and treble , mids are okay, the only problem I've had with jbl products is they have Bluetooth connection problems with my Chromebook.

title: Stopped working after 4 weeks of using!!
text: Bought these for my husband for Christmas! What a mistake. He used them for 4 weeks and now they don't work. They were awesome when they did! Upset!! And now I can't return them.

title: OUTSTANDING!
text: Outstanding performance, love the noise-canceling capability!

title: Softest  cussion on me ears
text: These headphones are soft and non-sweating. I wear these all day to talk on my phone , and listing on social media. Most headsets tend to make my ears sweat after wearing them to long..but not these. They Light weight and foldable.and the sound is evenly distributed in both ears. Love them

title: Smallest Earpads/Earmuffs Ever
text: I was excited to get some decent sound and long usage at the gym BUT these are fitting for kids or those with VERY SMALL ears. I have smaller than most guys but these are ridiculous. Through the years, I have bought/use many headphones.  All covered my ears. These do not at all.

title: Charging port doesn’t fit any cable. They won’t return.
text:
Charging port doesn’t fit any cable— let alone the one they included. Support won’t return it because it’s been too long (one month). I only just now needed to charge it.
Trash support. Trash product.

title: It broke
text: It broke within the first week and every time i glue it back together it breaks again. Cheap and doesn’t do what it needs to do

title: Perfect
text: These are great headphones. Can’t speak to the noise canceling as I haven’t taken them on a plane. Bass is good and sound is perfect. Fits nice and snug but doesn’t hurt

title: Nice!
text: If you don’t want to hear your wife or kids when they try talking to you… buy them lol They work great! Perfect for the price.

title: Sounds Great
text: Comfortable and good sound, too. I'm happy.

title: Very small ear cups; good for kids, not adults.
text:
Sound and Bass is great; easy fold design. Ear cups are very small, do not fit around large ears.
Good size for kids; too small for adults.

title: Nice option
text: In this price range best headphones for the $$

title: Lots of attributes, excepting the actual sound
text:
I wanted to give these a two- or three-star rating, but to be fair, for $25 bucks, the build quality is very good, the comfort and fit is good (and the relatively high pressure they exert on the ears really helps with sound isolation), the battery life is good and the Bluetooth connection to my iPhone and computer is good.

The sound though ... it's fairly bad. I've had some cheap headphones that punch far above their weight clas, but these are not among them. To me, they're a bit out of balance, with too much mid and upper bass, making the mids sound a bit recessed. That's not necessarily bad because these headphones are seriously lacking in clarity and detail. Back to back with a set of wired Philips Fidelio M1 Mk2 headphones (which I bought "refurbished" for $40), the JVCs have a bit of a murky transistor radio sound, and you don't want that right in your face. Better to have the pounding drums. There's not a lot of low bass, or a lot of high treble (that I can hear, at le

title: Great exchange purchase
text: I originally purchased a pair of Sony Bluetooth wireless headphones with a mic unfortunately  there’s a feature called side tone you couldn’t  disable. I exchanged them for these and the quality is outstanding. I had no problem with connecting to google meets and pairing to my MacBook and windows computer along with iPhone. Definitely recommend.

title: Amazing value
text:
These headphones have great bass, and while they may not be considered noise-canceling, they seem to block the outside world quite well while music is playing.

Big shout-out to Amazon for delivering these the same day I ordered them. Nice living near a distribution facility.

title: Nice little gadget
text:
Its nice.. but if you intent to jogg or work using it... it will.be wet with your ears sweat and keep on sliding off your head.
Sound and volume.. if you try to increase volume it.will change the track playing.
Sound is ok.
Noise.prevention.. none...

title: Great headphones for the price.
text: So far so good. Fit well on ears. I have a big head, so a bit tight but not uncomfortable.  Good low profile headphones.

title: Amazing value!  I just received these for Christmas.  LOVE them!
text: Fantastic value:  Comfortable, quick charging and good sound quality!

title: Good value
text: These are a little too bass-heavy, but really sound pretty good considering the price.  I like that once paired, they connect to my PC via Bluetooth automatically whenever I power them on.  It's nice not having to do any extra fiddling with settings each time I use them.

title: Best headphones I’ve ever used!!
text: I am over the moon pleased with these earphones. I bought them on sale and I was a little worried about the quality because of how inexpensive they were…but I was totally wrong! These headphones are worth so much more! I’ve only charged mine once in the last 4 weeks and they haven’t died yet. Connects to iPhones very easily. I was worried the white ones would get dirty easily but so far so good. 10/10 recommend!

title: Excellent Headphones
text: Got these headphones during a major sale and I am in LOVE! I would be just as satisfied if I had paid full price, they’re that good. Incredibly comfortable, noise cancelling is fantastic, buttons are very easy and responsive, battery lasts forever, and the bass kicks like crazy. I get so lost in anything I’m doing when I have these on. Sometimes I just put them on with no audio for an extra level of peace and quiet.

title: Great buy!
text: Sound is crisp and clear. They are comfortable and look good! Very happy with them and they priced fair! A+

title: Charge port very suspect
text: This is the second Sony 510 bt I have purchased as the first pair suddenly stopped charging only result was a melted housing sadly the second pair are now having the same issue don’t waste your money!!!!!

title: Ear pads
text: The ear pads are much too small as though they were made for a child to wear. They will not cover the ear at all. My head is not a large head. Several years ago JBL had a reputation for quality products. I will keep the item rather than taking the trouble to return it

title: Works for 15 seconds and cuts off
text:
I was very hopeful and excited for these headphones. However, after charging them completely, they don’t stay connected to my device without cutting out every 15-25 seconds for 5 seconds blocks. I’ve reset the headphones, rebooted my computer, disconnected and reconnected - nothing works. And the return process requires me to travel two cities to hand it in, so it’s a wash of a headphones. Big bummer.

They did arrive quickly and packaged well.

title: Excellent Product
text: Excellent product, arrived in 1 business day!

title: Excelente calidad precio.
text: Son muy buenos por el precio. Mientras puedas aprovechar las ofertas, es una excelente opción de compra. Cómodos y duraderos. La batería dura bastante y la calidad del sonido es muy buena.

title: Good listening
text: I got these for the gym. It’s comfortable it works. The sound is great volume is great and I recommend

title: Good product.
text: Excellent battery life. Sound very clear.

title: Very loose size adjustment
text: Each side clicks slightly as it slides up and down to adjust head sizes but it’s very easy for them to slide and makes it annoying to be constantly adjusting them.

title: Buy these headphones!
text: These are great quality headphones at the fraction of cost you would spend on other headphones with equal or less quality! Very comfortable and practical.  They are so soft and lightweight and fit securely. A must have! Buy these now!!!!

title: Very comfortable headphones
text: I use these jbl headphones at the gym, and now I don't have a problem listening to my music, because the gym has very noisy classes I could hardly hear my tunes with earbuds, the headphones are well made, comfortable and the battery lasts a lot longer.

title: Uncomfortable fit for me
text: Technically a good item, just not a comfortable fit.

title: They sound great
text: Love these new headphones.  They sound great and fit my head good.  I hate when headphones are too tight.

title: Good headphones
text: These are pretty good headphones.

title: Small
text: If they didn’t fit like child’s headphones they’d be amazing.

title: Sounds better than I expected.
text:
Used them for a day. My wife tried then. Now they're hers. Lol <3

I got another pair, though a different brand. But these were/are perfectly fine.

title: Not full size headphones
text: These are about 1/2 the size of a regular headphone.

title: I love this product!
text: I'm in love with this! It has the best quality. I use it for the gym and also for recording youtube videos! It works perfectly and I love the battery quality!
